channel.title: The Block
channel.description: The Block features breaking Crypto news about Bitcoin, Blockchain, Web3, and DeFi from the web's most reliable source.

image.title: The Block | Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Crypto News

item.title: Multicoin Capital makes first Hyperliquid ecosystem investment in Trasia, an Asia-focused trading platform
item.dc:creator: Yogita Khatri
item.description: Built on Hyperliquid, Trasia was co-founded by former Multicoin Capital partner Mable Jiang and aims to serve Asian traders.
item.content:encoded: Built on Hyperliquid, Trasia was co-founded by former Multicoin Capital partner Mable Jiang and aims to serve Asian traders.

item.title: Visa launching internal stablecoin platform for clients that provides access to OUSD: report
item.dc:creator: RT Watson
item.description: Open Standard's stablecoin is expected to become a major competitor to Circle's USDC, the dominant stablecoin in the U.S.
item.content:encoded: Open Standard's stablecoin is expected to become a major competitor to Circle's USDC, the dominant stablecoin in the U.S.

item.title: US jury indicts South Dakota crypto investor on 29 counts over alleged $20 million investor fraud
item.dc:creator: Naga Avan-Nomayo
item.description: DOJ indicted Sioux Falls crypto investor Benjamin Paul Wiener on 29 counts over an alleged $20 million fraud, with a trial set for Sept. 15.
item.content:encoded: DOJ indicted Sioux Falls crypto investor Benjamin Paul Wiener on 29 counts over an alleged $20 million fraud, with a trial set for Sept. 15.

item.title: SBI extends onchain finance push with Ondo deal to tokenize Japanese stocks
item.dc:creator: Kyle Baird
item.description: Japan's SBI Holdings will use JPYSC for settlement and collateral while distributing Ondo products through its network.
item.content:encoded: Japan's SBI Holdings will use JPYSC for settlement and collateral while distributing Ondo products through its network.

item.title: Keyrock closes deal for BlockFills’ institutional trading and brokerage assets
item.dc:creator: Daniel Kuhn
item.description: The Brussels-based firm was earlier selected as the buyer for $3.25 million in BlockFills’ Chapter 11 bankruptcy process.
item.content:encoded: The Brussels-based firm was earlier selected as the buyer for $3.25 million in BlockFills’ Chapter 11 bankruptcy process.

item.title: Polygon Labs announces second round of layoffs in 2026 as firm looks to finalize Coinme acquisition
item.dc:creator: Daniel Kuhn
item.description: "Two rounds of changes in one year is a lot to ask of a team, and I understand it is hard to manage," Polygon Labs CEO Marc Boiron said.
item.content:encoded: "Two rounds of changes in one year is a lot to ask of a team, and I understand it is hard to manage," Polygon Labs CEO Marc Boiron said.

item.title: Ledger unveils hardware-backed Agent Stack to prevent rogue AI transactions
item.dc:creator: Daniel Kuhn
item.description: With Ledger Agent Stack, users can deploy bots to read balances, suggest transactions, prepare swaps and draft operations.
item.content:encoded: With Ledger Agent Stack, users can deploy bots to read balances, suggest transactions, prepare swaps and draft operations.

item.title: MoonPay acquires Y Combinator-backed crypto deposits startup Glide in all-equity deal
item.dc:creator: Yogita Khatri
item.description: Crypto unicorn MoonPay has acquired Glide, a Y Combinator-backed crypto deposits startup, in an all-equity deal.
item.content:encoded: Crypto unicorn MoonPay has acquired Glide, a Y Combinator-backed crypto deposits startup, in an all-equity deal.

item.title: Dune research finds 85% of concentrated DeFi liquidity is underutilized, with $150M in annual fees foregone
item.dc:creator: Naga Avan-Nomayo
item.description: Dune research commissioned by 1inch finds 85% of concentrated DeFi liquidity underutilized, with $150M in annual fees forgone.
item.content:encoded: Dune research commissioned by 1inch finds 85% of concentrated DeFi liquidity underutilized, with $150M in annual fees forgone.

item.title: Tether invests $20 million in Ualá as the fintech firm reaches $3.2 billion valuation
item.dc:creator: Brian Danga
item.description: Tether invested $20 million in Argentine neobank Ualá, joining a $197 million funding round that valued the fintech at $3.2 billion.
item.content:encoded: Tether invested $20 million in Argentine neobank Ualá, joining a $197 million funding round that valued the fintech at $3.2 billion.

item.title: Jeff Booth, Lyn Alden-backed ORANGE JUICE raises $40 million to launch permanent capital firm with bitcoin treasury strategy
item.dc:creator: Brian Danga
item.description: ORANGE JUICE raised $40 million to acquire businesses, pursue a bitcoin treasury strategy, and implement a permanent capital ownership model.
item.content:encoded: ORANGE JUICE raised $40 million to acquire businesses, pursue a bitcoin treasury strategy, and implement a permanent capital ownership model.

item.title: Volvo Group tests proprietary cryptocurrency for supplier transactions in blockchain push
item.dc:creator: Danny Park
item.description: Volvo Group's proprietary cryptocurrency project remains in the ideation stage and is not yet industrialized.
item.content:encoded: Volvo Group's proprietary cryptocurrency project remains in the ideation stage and is not yet industrialized.

item.title: Lummis, Gallego secure unanimous Senate approval opposing Sam Bankman-Fried clemency
item.dc:creator: Brian Danga
item.description: The U.S. Senate unanimously approved a resolution opposing a presidential pardon or commutation for convicted FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried.
item.content:encoded: The U.S. Senate unanimously approved a resolution opposing a presidential pardon or commutation for convicted FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried.

item.title: Visa says stablecoins will power micro-commerce in AI agentic economy
item.dc:creator: Danny Park
item.description: Visa said it expects agentic commerce to integrate a hybrid flow that combines both card and stablecoin rails at different stages of a task.
item.content:encoded: Visa said it expects agentic commerce to integrate a hybrid flow that combines both card and stablecoin rails at different stages of a task.

item.title: Bitcoin whale moves $383 million in BTC after 8 years of dormancy: onchain data
item.dc:creator: Timmy Shen
item.description: A bitcoin OG wallet transferred 5,908 BTC to a new address on Wednesday, according to Lookonchain, citing Arkham data.
item.content:encoded: A bitcoin OG wallet transferred 5,908 BTC to a new address on Wednesday, according to Lookonchain, citing Arkham data.

item.title: California pair charged with laundering crypto proceeds from darknet fentanyl sales
item.dc:creator: Timmy Shen
item.description: The pair allegedly shipped over 500 drug parcels over a seven-month period and laundered hundreds of thousands of dollars through crypto.
item.content:encoded: The pair allegedly shipped over 500 drug parcels over a seven-month period and laundered hundreds of thousands of dollars through crypto.

item.title: From Perpetual Swaps to Perpetual CFDs: The Regulated Evolution
item.dc:creator: The Block Research
item.description: The 24/7 Trading Imperative Fixed exchange sessions are a structural mismatch with the global retail base. The NYSE opens at 9:30 a.m. Eastern and closes at 4:00 p.m., a window designed for an era when the participant base was concentrated in a single geography and order flow was physically intermediated. That assumption has shifted as […]
item.content:encoded: The 24/7 Trading Imperative Fixed exchange sessions are a structural mismatch with the global retail base. The NYSE opens at 9:30 a.m. Eastern and closes at 4:00 p.m., a window designed for an era when the participant base was concentrated in a single geography and order flow was physically intermediated. That assumption has shifted as […]

item.title: Stripe-PayPal deal could accelerate shift to blockchain-based money, Polygon exec says
item.dc:creator: RT Watson
item.description: "Within the next few years the majority of money will live and move on blockchain in one form or another," according to Polygon Labs.
item.content:encoded: "Within the next few years the majority of money will live and move on blockchain in one form or another," according to Polygon Labs.

item.title: Public Hyperliquid treasury firm Hyperion enters into new 500k HYPE bond agreement with Skew
item.dc:creator: Daniel Kuhn
item.description: Hyperion will deploy 500,000 tokens to Skew through a HYPE Asset Use Service (HAUS) agreement in exchange for equity and revenue share.
item.content:encoded: Hyperion will deploy 500,000 tokens to Skew through a HYPE Asset Use Service (HAUS) agreement in exchange for equity and revenue share.

item.title: Strategy CEO says company isn’t going anywhere as bitcoin buyer, sees debt concerns only below $10,000 BTC
item.dc:creator: Yogita Khatri
item.description: Strategy would begin considering risks associated with its debt only if bitcoin falls to around $8,000-$10,000, CEO Phong Le said.
item.content:encoded: Strategy would begin considering risks associated with its debt only if bitcoin falls to around $8,000-$10,000, CEO Phong Le said.
